claim_boundary.rule: Pending items are not completed result claims.

invariants: No test-set threshold or route tuning
Pending external baselines must remain unscored until executed

datasets.name: TEP
datasets.split: fault-run-aware train/validation/test split; no window overlap across split boundaries
datasets.window_or_label: strict 22-class fault labels with process windows and lag/residual graph evidence
datasets.thresholding: validation-only tau_R/tau_q selection; test used once
datasets.budget: seeds 42/43/44; shared threshold grid; matched preprocessing for all baselines

datasets.name: SKAB
datasets.split: time-series split by scenario/run with changepoint leakage blocked
datasets.window_or_label: binary anomaly windows; formal runs use 48-step windows and validation-only thresholds
datasets.budget: seeds 42/43/44; hidden_dim 64; max_paths 16; 40 epochs; no test-threshold tuning

datasets.name: Hydraulic
datasets.split: cycle-level split following target-specific operating states
datasets.thresholding: validation-only admission; no target-specific test tuning

datasets.name: C-MAPSS
datasets.split: FD001-FD004 train/test protocol with validation carved from training units
datasets.window_or_label: original remaining useful life regression; degradation-stage labels are auxiliary only
datasets.primary_metric: RUL RMSE, RUL MAE, and PHM-style RUL score
datasets.thresholding: no class-threshold tuning for primary RUL metric; validation-only route/admission selection
datasets.budget: seeds 42/43/44; pooled and per-subset RUL reporting

reliability_gate_obligations.name: ordinary gate
reliability_gate_obligations.purpose: tests whether a learned soft gate is enough

reliability_gate_obligations.name: attention gate
reliability_gate_obligations.purpose: tests whether edge or token attention explains the gain

reliability_gate_obligations.name: validation-only gate
reliability_gate_obligations.purpose: tests whether mean validation gain is sufficient without harm and perturbation evidence

reliability_gate_obligations.name: complete reliability admission
reliability_gate_obligations.optimization: global admission plus local ERE routing
reliability_gate_obligations.purpose: target method; deployment risk control before bounded correction

systematic_ablation_plan.name: Anchor only
systematic_ablation_plan.intervention: remove all challengers and reliability correction

systematic_ablation_plan.name: Unfiltered evidence
systematic_ablation_plan.intervention: use all generated evidence without reliability admission

systematic_ablation_plan.name: Expert only
systematic_ablation_plan.intervention: keep expert mechanism evidence; remove LLM/statistical sources

systematic_ablation_plan.name: LLM only
systematic_ablation_plan.intervention: keep LLM-generated weak-class rules; remove expert/statistical sources

systematic_ablation_plan.name: Lag/residual only
systematic_ablation_plan.intervention: keep lag and residual triggers; remove expert/LLM graph evidence

systematic_ablation_plan.name: Graph only
systematic_ablation_plan.intervention: keep graph path evidence; remove residual and source reliability channels

systematic_ablation_plan.name: Full model
systematic_ablation_plan.intervention: use all source, safety, perturbation, and routing terms
